description: In this episode of the Binance podcast, host Jared Winn speaks with Lucia, a Binance team member in Italy, about her experiences during the COVID-19 pandemic. They discuss the initial reactions to the virus, the rapid spread in Italy, and the challenges faced in securing protective equipment like masks and gloves. Lucia shares insights on the lockdown measures and the impact on daily life in Italy.
topic_summary: Jared Winn interviews Lucia about the COVID-19 pandemic's impact in Italy, discussing the timeline of events from the initial lockdown in Wuhan to the nationwide lockdown in Italy, and the challenges of obtaining protective gear [t=11:60-311:12].
